sourceNoteIntro: This Pulse uses CRMLS / InfoSparks data for Rancho Palos Verdes, with the article read and chart defaulting to the Residential / Single family live MLS slice sourced from 7/5/2026. The broader Residential export is also available from 7/2/2026. It also uses official city, school, federal, state, and consumer sources for local due-diligence context. Use this as orientation, not a property valuation, legal opinion, lending quote, insurance opinion, school assignment, or forecast.

notes: Housing Market Pulse generated from structured manifest. Keyword intent angle: inventory competition versus pending demand. Primary keyword: Rancho Palos Verdes housing market update. Google Keyword Planner seed queries: Rancho Palos Verdes housing market; Rancho Palos Verdes real estate market update; Rancho Palos Verdes home prices July 2026; should I sell my house in Rancho Palos Verdes; Rancho Palos Verdes home selling market; Rancho Palos Verdes homes for sale inventory; Rancho Palos Verdes days on market; Rancho Palos Verdes listing price; Rancho Palos Verdes seller market; Rancho Palos Verdes housing market 2026; Rancho Palos Verdes market update sellers; Rancho Palos Verdes median home price; are home prices dropping in Rancho Palos Verdes; is now a good time to sell in Rancho Palos Verdes. Research packet records editorial context. Visible avatar labels are prohibited and were not used in public page headings, badges, or category labels. Market metrics reviewed: medianSalePrice, averageSalePrice, averagePpsf, medianOriginalPrice, newListings, activeInventory, pendingSales, closedSales, monthsSupply, medianDaysOnMarket, averageDaysOnMarket. Missing/no-data metrics: closedVolume, totalClosedSides, medianLastListPrice, averageLastListPrice, medianShowsToContract, averageShowsToContract, showsPerListing.
